title: Happy Town: Community Helpers
subtitle: Preschool Activity & Coloring Book

amazon_reviews.text: My daughter loves the characters! The activities are perfect for her age.
amazon_reviews.author: Parent in Texas

amazon_reviews.text: Great quality coloring pages. My preschooler asks for this book every day.
amazon_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

description: Meet Blaze the firefighter bear, Rosie the doctor rabbit, Chase the police dog, and Frankie the mail carrier fox — four lovable friends who keep Happy Town running! This 48-page activity and coloring book is designed specifically for ages 3-5, with simple coloring pages, matching games, tracing activities, and find-and-color challenges. Single-sided printing means no bleed-through, and every page is built to engage little hands and big imaginations.

title: Cozy Girl Self-Care Coloring Book
subtitle: 96 Pages of Relaxation & Creative Mindfulness
description: Your coloring ritual starts here. 96 single-sided pages of bath scenes, candle-lit evenings, reading nooks, coffee mornings, and skincare moments — designed for adults who want to turn 20 minutes of coloring into a genuine self-care practice. Includes a QR code to unlock your Ritual Bundle: a curated Spotify playlist, guided meditation, journaling prompts, and color palette card.
